programmes.show_description: When Craig's brother Brent cuts corners to get extra wood off the mountain, a mistake shuts the entire operation down. Craig needs to decide if he can bail Brent out.
Outback legend Steve Grahame is hauling three million dollars' worth of vital power generating equipment to Kalumburu, an isolated community in the far North West of Australia.
A £300,000 supercar has crashed in a Surrey wood. Daniel and Sean have to whip out a chainsaw to cut their own exit route. A 14-ton road sweeper needs recovering on a farmyard.
Action in this episode includes a burning truck full of bricks on the A69, a tipper truck caught in mud on a private lane, and a Sprinter Van with a broken rear differential.
Teleshopping.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Award winning eFOLDi lightweight electric folding mobility scooters.
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
Your one-stop-shop for all things cruise; bringing you the hottest destinations, ground-breaking ships and the latest deals to ensure your next cruise holiday is your greatest one!
Yorkshire's traffic cops are in hot pursuit of some criminals dragging a generator with just one wheel across the county, and a van full of contraband in Bradford.
This episode opens with the hunt for three teens alleged to have threatened a shopkeeper with a gun. The firearms team flood the area.
Police follow up reports of a crossbow. Mark pursues the world's worst driver.
Joel McCrea, Randolph Scott and Mariette Hartley star as a group who try to steal gold from a mine in the state of New Mexico. (1962)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Joel McCrea, Randolph Scott and Mariette Hartley star as a group who try to steal gold from a mine in the state of New Mexico. (1962)
Western. When a town boss confiscates homesteaders' supplies after gold is discovered, a tough cowboy risks his life to try and get it to them. Starring James Stewart and Rock Hudson. (1952)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western. When a town boss confiscates homesteaders' supplies after gold is discovered, a tough cowboy risks his life to try and get it to them. Starring James Stewart and Rock Hudson. (1952)
A 36-tonne crusher needs transporting from Anglesey to Liverpool, and a holiday home is moved from Hull to the Isle of Arran..
A speeding murder suspect is pursued through downtown Bradford, and a speeding car thief picks a fight with a tree.
Charlie and Paul pursue a driver that stole fuel, and Chris and Sophie spot a bunny-hopping learner driver who already has eight points on his provisional license.
Ben and Matt find themselves on a high-speed pursuit which ends up on a road to nowhere.
A worse-for-wear driver in North Tyneside has no plans to come quietly when pursued by the cops, and a police chopper helps track down a driver on the run.
A driver seems more concerned about losing his footwear than getting nicked! And late night, a PC hunts for a suspected cloned car linked to a recent burglary.
With first time access to a police CID unit, this series follows detectives investigating serious cases - from the start of an investigation to the moment they confront their suspects.
Drama series. Mulder and Scully investigate the mysterious case of a military test pilot who disappeared after taking part in secret test flights.
Craig's newest driver must prove himself on Mud Mountain; facing ice, muck and massive pressure, Theron tries to stay ahead of the fleet, only to be stopped by someone else's mistake.
It's mid-afternoon in Perth and Dion's super size convoy is pushing hard to get out of the city before sunset. And the fate of Steve's trip hangs on one phone call to his mechanic.
Near Durham, the Alpha Recovery team face a challenge that they've never encountered before; a double decker bus has rolled over onto its side - a rare occurrence for this vehicle.
A tipper truck sinks into deep mud on an isolated farm track, a car has crashed onto an embankment, and a lorry breaks down off a busy roundabout in rush hour.

Documentary series following the crews who keep Britain moving when a big freeze strikes.
Police chase a stolen Renault until the driver crashes; a strip search reveals Class A drugs; police bust a large-scale cannabis farm; a man forgets to pay his gas bill.
Nottinghamshire's finest are back with a bang as the interceptors clash with a runaway driver in one of the most epic police pursuits ever caught on camera.
Comedy western about a penniless outlaw who attempts a heist in a bid to acquire the wealth he needs to keep his fiancee. Director: Andrew V McClaglen.
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Comedy western about a penniless outlaw who attempts a heist in a bid to acquire the wealth he needs to keep his fiancee. Director: Andrew V McClaglen.
Western. A reformed gambler turned preacher partnered with a pretty female fugitive outlaw runs into an old pal who's also a marshal, and they both fall for the same bad gal. (1949)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.
Western. A reformed gambler turned preacher partnered with a pretty female fugitive outlaw runs into an old pal who's also a marshal, and they both fall for the same bad gal. (1949)
In Wales, haulier Ian gears himself up for a major cross-country mega-move that requires a police escort. And in Hull, mega mover Steve is in charge of shifting a 38-tonne screener.
A young speeder writes his car off in a spectacular fireball, and cops pursue a car containing a familiar face...
Steve rides to the aid of the armed response team after reports of a man drawing a gun on a pizza delivery driver. Charley and Wayne take away a drink driver at the drive thru.
Sergeant Mick and the Operational Support Unit carry out a raid on a house with suspected drug activity.
A child is knocked off his bike - but the wait time for an ambulance is three hours. Martain spots a speedy driver. It turns out to be a takeaway 'emergency'.
It's foot to the floor time as Interceptors Richie and Harrison join the pursuit of a Toyota that fails to stop. The cops are horrified to discover a 14-year-old at the wheel.
Officers are called to a fight in a takeaway and four are arrested; a group of people abandon their car after a hit and run; bouncers are racially abused by passerby.
Scully is assigned to track down a serial killer whose victims were all killed inside locked rooms.
